creator: mark@exonetric.com
text:
I'm offering to take over maintainership and/or hosting of any UK-specific freebsd sites.

I'm not sure who the current UK maintainer might be. Joe Karthauser?

Anyway, ukug.uk.freebsd.org doesn't point to a working server,
so at the very least it should point to a place holder and/or
the mailing list here.

http://mailman.uk.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/ukfreebsd

Regards,
Mark Blackman
Exonetric

How-To-Repeat: see page 

http://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html#europe

Try UK link, http://ukug.uk.freebsd.org and there is no response.
